title: Roguecraft: Communism
description: A add-on for Roguecraft that splits skill points equally!
body:
Roguecraft: Communism does something very simple: it splits skill points. This is useful if you are playing with others because it keeps everyone equally balanced.

Installation note: Make sure to have RC: Communism above Roguecraft in the datapack install menu: (like this)
![Correct layout for installation (RC: Communism on top)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dffb157bdf3d243f8f6f72d1b0f65f3247e38fd8.png)

#
This project is not associated with the [Roguecraft development team](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rogue-craft)
